説明文: It lives in warm, shallow waters. If it encounters a foe, it will spit out its internal organs as a means to punch them.

特性.効果: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon, do 50 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.

説明文: This guardian deity of Poni Island manipulates water. Because it lives deep within a thick fog, it came to be both feared and revered.
This form of Oricorio has sipped yellow nectar. It uses nimble steps to approach opponents, then knocks them out with electric punches.

特性.効果: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent’s Pokémonex.

説明文: Although it’s called a guardian deity, if a person or Pokémon puts it in a bad mood, it will become a malevolent deity and attack.

ワザ.効果: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched  Pokémon.

説明文: Nectar and pollen are its favorite fare. In fields of flowers, it gets into skirmishes with Butterfree over food.
Comfey picks flowers with its vine and decorates itself with them. For some reason, flowers won’t wither once they’re attached to a Comfey.

特性.効果: Each of your Pokémon that has anyEnergy attached recovers from all Special Conditions and can’t be affected by any Special Conditions.

説明文: If it loses its shovel, it will stick something else—like a branch—in its head to make do until it finds another shovel.
It heals the wounds of people and Pokémon by sprinkling them with its sparkling scales. This guardian deity is worshiped on Akala.

ワザ.効果: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon for each Energy attached to that Pokémon.

説明文: Even though its helpless, gaseous body can be blown away by the slightest breeze, it doesn’t seem to care.

ワザ.効果: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

説明文: This Pokémon is very friendly when it’s young. Its disposition becomes vicious once it matures, but it never forgets the kindness of its master.

ワザ.効果: Put a random card that evolves from Rockruff from your deck into your hand.

説明文: This Pokémon has been treasured not just for its physical labor but also because it produces high-quality mud used for making pottery.

ワザ.効果: This Pokémon also does 40 damage to itself.

説明文: Places where Minior fall from the night sky are few and far between, with Alola being one of the precious few.

ワザ.効果: This attack does 40 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.

説明文: It synchronizes its consciousness with others to understand their feelings. This faculty makes it useful for taking care of people.

ワザ.効果: If your opponent’s Active Pokémon has an Ability, this attack does 40 more damage.

説明文: The mountains it calls home are nearly two miles in height. On rare occasions, it descends to play with the children living in the towns below.

ワザ.効果: If any of your Benched Pokémon have damage on them, this attack does 50 more damage.

説明文: It pecks at trees with its hard beak. You can get some idea of its mood or condition from the rhythm of its pecking.
Once it accepts you as a friend, it tries to show its affection with a hug. Letting it do that is dangerous—it could easily shatter your bones.
Komala spends its entire life sleeping. It feeds on leaves that contain a potent poison only Komala can break down.

特性.効果: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, whenever you attach an Energy from your Energy Zone to it, it is now Asleep.

ワザ.効果: This attack does 100 damage to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon that have damage on them.
During your opponent’s next turn, the Defending Pokémon can’t retreat.
Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Burned.
If this Pokémon has damage on it, this attack does 60 more damage.
During your next turn, this Pokémon’s Insatiable Striking attack does +40 damage.
This attack does 40 more damage for each of your Benched Wishiwashi and Wishiwashi ex.
This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.

特性.効果: Once during your turn, you may move allEnergy from 1 of your BenchedPokémon to your Active Pokémon.
If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is Knocked Out by damage from an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon, move allEnergy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

ワザ.効果: 1 Special Condition from among Asleep, Burned, Confused, Paralyzed, and Poisoned is chosen at random, and your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now affected by that Special Condition. Any Special Conditions already affecting that Pokémon will not be chosen.

特性.効果: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may switch it with your Active Pokémon.

ワザ.効果: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

カードの効果.追加ルール: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

カードの効果.発動効果: Put 1 of your [Colorless] Pokémon that has damage on it into your hand.

カードの効果.追加ルール: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

説明文: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this Pokémon is born. The seed slowly grows larger.
When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

0: Venusaur,                                         Mega Venusaur ex,                                         Venusaur ex

説明文: Its plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.
Though it may look like it’s just a bunch of eggs, it’s a proper Pokémon. Exeggcute communicates with others of its kind via telepathy, apparently.
Each of Exeggutor’s three heads is thinking different thoughts. The three don’t seem to be very interested in one another.

ワザ.効果: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.

説明文: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.
It is recognized as a symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that Wartortle is very old.

0: Blastoise ex,                                         Blastoise,                                         Mega Blastoise ex

説明文: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.

ワザ.効果: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra  Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

説明文: If you visit a beach at the end of summer, you’ll be able to see groups of Staryu lighting up in a steady rhythm.
This Pokémon has an organ known as its core. The organ glows in seven colors when Starmie is unleashing its potent psychic powers.
It wraps its opponent in its gas-like body, slowly weakening its prey by poisoning it through the skin.

ワザ.効果: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent reveals a random card from their hand and shuffles it into their deck.

説明文: It likes to lurk in the dark and tap shoulders with a gaseous hand. Its touch causes endless shuddering.
To steal the life of its target, it slips into the prey’s shadow and silently waits for an opportunity.

ワザ.効果: Your opponent can’t use any Supporter cards from their hand during their next turn.

説明文: Its whole body is composed of muscles. Even though it’s the size of a human child, it can hurl 100 grown-ups.
Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.
It quickly swings its four arms to rock its opponents with ceaseless punches and chops from all angles.

ワザ.効果: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra  Energy attached, this attack does 50 more damage.

説明文: When the memory of its departed mother brings it to tears, its cries echo mournfully within the skull it wears on its head.

ワザ.効果: During your opponent’s next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do −20 damage.

説明文: This Pokémon overcame its sorrow to evolve a sturdy new body. Marowak faces its opponents bravely, using a bone as a weapon.
When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.
It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a body slam.

特性.効果: Once during your turn, you may heal 20 damage from your Active Pokémon.

ワザ.効果: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.
If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra  Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

特性.効果: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent can’t use any Supporter cards from their hand.

ワザ.効果: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage for each heads.
Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

特性.効果: Once during your turn, you may move allEnergy from 1 of your BenchedPokémon to your Active Pokémon.
Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may switch it with your Active Pokémon.

ワザ.効果: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.
